Welcome To Our Firm

Fichte & Co is the leading law firm in Dubai, where our team of experienced lawyers and legal consultants in Dubai is committed to delivering comprehensive legal solutions tailored to your needs. Ranked among the  leading law firms in the Dubai & UAE  by  Legal 500  and  Chambers & Partners , Fichte & Co is a  full-service international law firm based in Dubai , with a strong focus on  shipping, insurance, trade, maritime, finance, corporate, commercial law and dispute resolution . At Fichte & Co, we pride ourselves on providing innovative, strategic advice that protects your interests and helps your business thrive. Partner with us for trusted legal services in Dubai and beyond.

The UAE Legal Guide

“The UAE Legal Guide” book aims to provide an overview of the UAE’s legal system, main UAE laws, and the UAE courts system. It is targeting lawyers practicing or planning to practice in the UAE as well as investors and CEOs who need a basic understanding of the UAE legal system. It also provides practical guidelines from seasoned lawyers and litigators on the best practices and legal approaches in the UAE.

About Us

Ranked among the leading law firms in the UAE by Legal 500 and Chambers & Partners , Fichte & Co is a full-service international law firm based in Dubai , with a strong focus on shipping, insurance, trade, and dispute resolution .
Founded with deep roots in the maritime industry, Fichte & Co has grown into a dynamic, multidisciplinary firm offering comprehensive legal services across all major practice areas. Our team of over 25 dual-qualified Arabic and international lawyers combines global expertise with local insight to serve clients in the UAE, the wider Middle East, and beyond.
We work closely with shipowners, offshore operators, insurers, financial institutions, and trading companies , providing practical, business-oriented legal solutions across every aspect of their operations. Among our landmark achievements is being the first law firm to successfully enforce an international arbitration award in the UAE courts under the New York Convention . 
At Fichte & Co, our clients’ interests come first. We listen, adapt, and grow in line with their 
 

evolving needs. Our reputation for getting things done — efficiently, on time, and cost-effectively — is built on our unmatched local know-how, regional network, and a personal, professional approach that ensures the best results.

When it comes to disputes, we believe litigation should always be the last resort. Our international team is highly experienced in arbitration and alternative dispute resolution , helping clients resolve matters quickly, preserve business relationships, and focus on what matters most — their success.

When it comes to dispute resolution, we strongly believe that litigation before any court or tribunal should be the ultima ratio, and that clients’ interests are best served if we can avoid costly and lengthy trials. Our international team of legal experts is highly experienced in alternative forms of dispute resolution and arbitration, and understand that solving matters amicably not only saves clients’ time and resources, but also increases the chance of maintaining commercial relationships between parties.
